infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to capture proof of delivery photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location to track trip progress and provide accurate delivery information.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs access to your location in the background to track trip progress even when the app is not in use.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to your microphone for voice-to-text note entry.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera for proof of delivery photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location for trip tracking.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location in the background for continuous trip tracking.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location for trip tracking.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use Face ID for secure login.
